items.question: Scrub the fake CVPR claim from remaining stale sources?
items.context: Removed from new BedRock site. Still present in: (1) live wenxuan.surge.sh portfolio via portfolio/portfolio-site/, (2) portfolio/portfolio-content.md, (3) ONBOARDING.md, (4) INSTRUCTIONS.md, (5) context/my-background.md, (6) context/jd-2-ai-agent-researcher.md, (7) fact-sheets/research-3d-scene.md. Want me to open a follow-up PR scrubbing all of these?

items.question: Review & merge BedRock PR #1 (Astro site)
items.context: https://github.com/Taylorblue123/BedRock/pull/1 — adds site/ with home, /now, /projects. CVPR claim removed. Build green. Privacy grep clean. No icon/favicon (brand call).
